mapper.select: SELECT VPS.ID, VPS.POST_TITLE, VPS.POST_CONTENT, VPS.POST_READ_COUNT, VPS.POST_CREATE_AT, VPS.POST_TAG, VPS.USER_ID, VPS.USER_NICKNAME, VPS.USER_PROFILE, NVL(VPS.LIKE_COUNT, 0) AS LIKE_COUNT, NVL(VPS.COMMENT_COUNT, 0) AS COMMENT_COUNT, CASE WHEN TBPLU.USER_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS IS_LIKED, CASE WHEN #{userId} IS NOT NULL AND VPS.USER_ID = #{userId} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS IS_OWNER FROM VW_POST_SUMMARY VPS LEFT JOIN TBL_POST_LIKE TBPLU ON VPS.ID = TBPLU.POST_ID AND TBPLU.USER_ID = #{userId} WHERE VPS.ID = #{id} AND VPS.POST_IS_DELETED = 0

SELECT VPS.ID, VPS.POST_TITLE, VPS.POST_CONTENT, VPS.POST_READ_COUNT, VPS.POST_CREATE_AT, VPS.POST_TAG, VPS.USER_ID, VPS.USER_NICKNAME, VPS.USER_PROFILE, NVL(VPS.LIKE_COUNT, 0) AS LIKE_COUNT, NVL(VPS.COMMENT_COUNT, 0) AS COMMENT_COUNT FROM TBL_POST_LIKE TPL JOIN VW_POST_SUMMARY VPS ON VPS.ID = TPL.POST_ID WHERE TPL.USER_ID = #{userId} AND VPS.POST_IS_DELETED = 0
AND (POST_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR POST_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR USER_NICKNAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
ORDER BY LIKE_COUNT DESC
ORDER BY TPL.ID DESC
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_POST_LIKE TPL JOIN TBL_POST TP ON TP.ID = TPL.POST_ID WHERE TPL.USER_ID = #{userId} AND TP.POST_IS_DELETED = 0

SELECT ID, POST_TITLE, POST_CONTENT ,POST_READ_COUNT, POST_CREATE_AT, POST_TAG, USER_ID, USER_NICKNAME, USER_PROFILE, NVL(LIKE_COUNT, 0) AS LIKE_COUNT, NVL(COMMENT_COUNT, 0) AS COMMENT_COUNT FROM VW_POST_SUMMARY WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND POST_IS_DELETED = 0
AND (POST_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR POST_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR USER_NICKNAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
ORDER BY LIKE_COUNT DESC
ORDER BY ID DESC
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_POST WHERE POST_IS_DELETED = 0
AND POST_TAG = #{postTag}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_POST WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND POST_IS_DELETED = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_POST WHERE ID = #{id} AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND POST_IS_DELETED = 0
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_POST.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_POST (ID, POST_TITLE, POST_CONTENT, POST_TAG, USER_ID) VALUES (#{id}, #{postTitle}, #{postContent}, #{postTag}, #{userId})
